---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What

One-paragraph description of the capability.

## Why

What problem does this solve? Who benefits? Is there a workaround today?

## Where on the roadmap

If the feature is already in `docs/ROADMAP.md`, link to the line/quarter so
we can confirm priority. If it's not on the roadmap and you think it should
be, explain why — we'd consider adding it.

## Sketch

(Optional) A few sentences on how you'd implement this. File paths, new
tool name, schema, etc. If you're up for sending a PR, mention it here.
